principle: Never use dark patterns — no confirmshaming, hidden costs, forced data sharing, pre-checked marketing boxes or deceptive button labels in generated interfaces
explanation: X.ux|no_dark_patterns: dark_patterns == deceptive_techniques_against_user_interest; banned: confirmshaming ("no_thanks_I_hate_saving_money") + hidden_costs_at_checkout + pre-checked_newsletter_boxes + forced_action ("share_contacts_to_proceed") + trick_questions + disguised_ads; 11K_sites_study: 1818_dark_pattern_instances_found; NO:guilt_trip_decline_buttons NO:hidden_fees_revealed_at_last_step NO:opt-out_buried_in_settings eg: "unsubscribe: are_you_sure_you_want_to_miss_out?" >> "unsubscribe: one_click_confirm + optional_feedback_why"

principle: Set all default settings to protect users interests first — privacy restrictive by default, marketing opt-in not opt-out, data sharing off until explicitly enabled
explanation: X.ux|ethical_defaults: most_users_never_change_defaults -> defaults == real_choices; facebook_study: default_privacy_matched_user_expectations_only_37%_of_time; ethical_defaults: privacy_max_by_default + marketing_unchecked + data_sharing_off + notifications_minimal; let_user_opt_IN_to_sharing NOT opt_OUT; NO:pre-checked_marketing_consent NO:share_everything_by_default NO:notifications_all_on eg: "signup: newsletter_pre-checked + share_with_partners_pre-checked" >> "signup: both_unchecked + clear_labels_what_each_does"

principle: Add protective friction before irreversible actions — confirmation modals for deletion, type-to-confirm for dangerous operations, double opt-in for email subscriptions
explanation: X.ux|protective_friction: frictionless != always_good; friction_protects: prevents_errors + enhances_security + avoids_unintended_consequences + promotes_critical_thought; required_for: account_deletion (type_DELETE_to_confirm) + large_purchases (review_order_step) + email_subscription (double_opt-in) + data_export (confirm_via_email); confirmation_modal -> activates_system_2_thinking -> conscious_decision; NO:one_click_delete_no_confirm NO:single_opt-in_for_marketing NO:frictionless_irreversible_actions eg: "delete_account_one_click" >> "delete_account: type_DELETE + wait_24h_grace_period + confirmation_email"
